---
title: 'Levels of Change Part Six'
date: '2013-11-07T20:02:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4623900336675927596'
blogger_filename: '/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-six_7.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<h2 style="text-align: center;">Foundations Class #2</h2><h2 style="text-align: center;">Levels of Change</h2><h3 style="text-align: center;">Bob Hamp</h3><h4 style="text-align: center;"><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: normal; mso-margin-bottom-alt: auto; mso-margin-top-alt: auto; mso-outline-level: 4; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot; , &quot;serif&quot;; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="http://bobhamp.com/media/" target="_blank">Class can be seen on BobHamp.com</a></span></b></div>Part Six</h4><h4 style="text-align: center;">SIN Problem - Identity Broken </h4><div style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/levels-of-change-6-84e4788da0a9.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="300" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/levels-of-change-6-f194b935872c.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br />Now,  often we make the mistake of defining SIN at the level of Behavior.  "SIN is something we do that we shouldn't do, think that we shouldn't  think, feel that we shouldn't feel." This is a trap because it causes  people to think "Sin is X, I'll just do Y instead..." this is wrong and  doesn't really solve the issue.<br /><br />1. We simply try to please God by changing our behavior.<br />2. We tend to receive God's whole solution for only part of the problem. <br /><br />Coming  to God about past Behavior is like taking Tylenol for a headache when  the cause of the headache is cancer. Forgiveness of sin deals with the  fruit of the problem, not the cause. Behavior is not the problem it's  the fruit of it. Tylenol WILL help deal with the symptom but you need a  stronger medicine to deal with the cause. <br /><br />It's as  though I would say to God "I stole a car. God please forgive me for what  I did." That's fine, the cross is there to wipe your past away, but  there is another level at which He gives you power over that so that you  don't do it again.<br /><br /><b>Incorrect/Incomplete Definition of Sin:</b> Bad Behavior<br /><br />The problem is that we so often define the problem as Behavior, when in fact Behavior is the fruit of the real problem. <br /><br /><b>Correct/More Complete Definition of Sin:</b> Sin is the absence of God in the Human soul.<br /><br />Where  there is not LIFE (God is Life) there is Death. Death reigns in the  Human soul where God does not. The source of your life of is cut off.  Death isn't about ceasing animation. Death is the absence of the force  of LIFE. Just as: Darkness is the absence of Light. <br /><br /><b>Soul:</b> Mind (thoughts), Will (behavior), Emotions (feelings). <br /><br /><b>The Trap of thinking Sin=Behavior:</b> the feeling of death hurts. We search for things external to make us  feel alive. Sex, Drugs, Rock and Roll, Religion, Ministry, TV, Movies,  Hobbies, Relationships, Etc.<br /><br />The fruit outwardly is a result of death inwardly.<br /><br />Jesus didn't die on the cross because the list of your behaviors = death legally.<br /><br />Jesus died on the cross because you have death, he had life. He had to make that exchange. <br /><br />Many people approach Jesus as savior to save us from past behavior.<br /><br />Jesus didn't die for what you've done, He died for who you ARE.<br /><br />You  don't come to Jesus to deal with the list of things you've done, but  you bring Him YOU, and he exchanges your dead self and replaces it with  His new self. When we bring him behavior all He can ask us to do is try  harder. When we bring Him our dead self he can make the Great Exchange.  In Jesus the wall of SIN separating us is removed. Therefore if we are  in Jesus our Identity is <a href="http://www.amazon.com/In-Him-Kenneth-E-Hagin/dp/0892760524" target="_blank">IN HIM</a> and that identity connects us to the rest we need to affect. <br /><h4><b>SIN: is not about behavior at all. SIN is DEATH working in us. Jesus didn't die for what we do, He died for who were ARE/WERE. ONLY Jesus can give us new life. </b></h4><br /><i>*The teachings of this class are not my own, they are derived from notes I took during a class at Gateway Church. You may view the class on their website by following the link at the top of the page.</i><br /><br /><br /><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/10/levels-of-change-part-one.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part One</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-two.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Two</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-three.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Three</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-four.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Four</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-five.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Five</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-six.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Six</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-seven.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Seven</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-eight.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Eight</a></li><li><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/levels-of-change-part-nine.html" target="_blank">Levels of Change Part Nine</a></li><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 12.72px; line-height: 16.36px;">______________________________________________</span><br /><br /><br />By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a><br /><br /><div><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" rel="nofollow" style="background-color: white; color: #397dbf; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; line-height: 16.36px; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">www.DarrellWolfe.com</a></div><div><br /><h4><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/connect.html" style="background-color: white; color: #397dbf; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; line-height: 16.36px; text-decoration: none;">Connect</a></h4></div><div><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , sans-serif;">Tumblr&nbsp;<a href="http://darrellwolfe.tumblr.com/" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe</a><br /><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">Facebook&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" style="line-height: 16.36px;" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a><br /><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">Twitter&nbsp;</span><a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" style="line-height: 16.36px;" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe</a><br /><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">Google+&nbsp;</span><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/106337514196493406365/+DarrellWolfeBlogspot/posts" rel="" style="line-height: 16.36px;" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a><br />YouTube&nbsp;<a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a></span><br /><ul></ul></div><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 12.72px; line-height: 16.36px;"><br /></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><b>Disclaimers:</b></i></span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><b><br /></b></i></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><b>FOR MY FULL DISCLAIMER: See my "<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">Start Here About</a>" page.&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a></b></i></span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><i><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">*&nbsp;<b>Information here is As-Is.</b>&nbsp;These are the opinions of a fellow traveler and seeker of truth. I am not a doctor, lawyer,&nbsp;</span><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">licensed</span><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">&nbsp;financial advisor, tax preparer, etc, etc... I'm just one guy, sharing what he's learned. As such, the information may be as true or faulty as the guy on the buss stop giving you directions. If you need accurate information I encourage you to seek the help of a professional in your field.&nbsp;</span></i></span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white; line-height: 16.36px;"><i>*<b>&nbsp;I do make money from this blog.</b>&nbsp;<a href="http://biblehub.com/1_timothy/5-18.htm" target="_blank">1 Tim 5:18</a>&nbsp;says the worker is worthy of his wages. I do earn affiliate commissions or freebies from some of the products I discuss at various points on this blog. Regardless I only suggest things that have personally helped me, or someone I know. If you click on an "Affiliate Link" and you buy something I'll get a cut. Thanks for your support!&nbsp;</i></span></span><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white; line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i>*&nbsp;<b>I am a conservative Christian.</b>&nbsp;I write from a bible-centric point of view. I welcome people from other points of view to jump into the&nbsp;conversation. If you don't like bible-centric writing: I encourage you not to read my posts.... Unless you want to learn something new.&nbsp;</i></span></span></span><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="background-color: white;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><b>* In all you do: Live Long and Prosper, with GOOD SUCCESS!&nbsp;</b></i></span></span></span><br /><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: x-small;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;"><i><br /></i></span></span><i><span style="font-size: x-small;"><b><span style="background-color: white; font-family: &quot;trebuchet ms&quot; , &quot;trebuchet&quot; , sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 16.36px;">Thank you,&nbsp;</span></span><a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b></span></i><br /><div><i><span style="font-size: x-small;"><br /></span></i></div>
